name: agentui
description: Localhost control plane for multi-agent CLI workflows (claude / grok) inside VSCode.

agentui.pythonPath.description: Python interpreter to use. If it already has the backend dependencies, it is used directly; otherwise a managed virtualenv is created. Leave blank to auto-detect.

agentui.appPath.description: Absolute path to the AgentUI `app` directory (the parent of `backend/`). Leave blank to use the copy shipped next to this extension (../app).

agentui.port.description: Fixed backend port. 0 = pick a free port automatically.
